file_insights.changes: Added --fast mode parameter to cmd_doctor function; conditionally skips make check verification when fast=true; includes new 69-line make check block that runs `make check` in repo root and reports pass/fail/error states; added test cmd_doctor_fast_mode
key_patterns: Function signature extended with bool parameter
Error handling via match on Command::new output
Failed counter incremented on both error states (exit code failure and command error)

file_insights.changes: Updated Doctor enum variant from unit variant to struct variant containing fast: bool field; updated command handler to extract and pass fast flag to cmd_doctor
key_patterns: Clap derive macro with #[arg(long)] attribute for CLI parsing
Destructuring enum variant in match arm to extract field value

patterns_discovered.description: Time-consuming operations (make check) are conditionally executed based on --fast boolean flag, allowing users to skip slow verification paths
patterns_discovered.impact: Improves UX by providing fast path for environments where full verification isn't needed

patterns_discovered.description: cards_root.parent().unwrap_or(cards_root) provides fallback when parent directory doesn't exist
patterns_discovered.impact: Prevents panics on edge case paths

patterns_discovered.description: Both command execution errors and non-zero exit codes increment failed counter separately, with different messaging
patterns_discovered.impact: Users get precise diagnostic information about which type of failure occurred

patterns_discovered.description: Consistent println! pattern: status_level<tab>description with optional error details
patterns_discovered.impact: Maintains visual consistency with existing doctor output

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Test doesn't validate make check execution path
gotchas_discovered.description: cmd_doctor_fast_mode test only exercises the skip branch; actual make check execution (Command output handling) is untested
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Would require mock Makefile or fixture setup in test; integration test might be better

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Test creates policy.toml even though irrelevant to make check
gotchas_discovered.description: Test setup includes fs::write policy.toml but doctor.rs doesn't check for it in make check section; suggests test was copied from existing pattern without full understanding
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Documentation or code comments explaining test setup dependencies

gotchas_discovered.description: Before --fast flag, make check was always skipped (not implemented); now it runs by default (fast=false). Existing scripts calling bop doctor will get slower execution
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: This is acceptable for a new feature, but worth noting in release notes

approach_outcome.summary: Feature successfully implemented with proper CLI integration and fast-path gating
key_accomplishments: --fast flag properly wired through clap derive to cmd_doctor parameter
Make check runs repo-wide from parent of cards_root with correct exit code reporting
Backward compatible: existing scripts get enhanced functionality (make check) by default
Test coverage added for fast mode

recommendations.recommendation: Add integration test for actual make check execution with a minimal mock Makefile in test fixture
recommendations.rationale: Current test only validates skip path; execute path has untested error handling paths (exit code and Command error branches)

recommendations.recommendation: Add comment explaining why make check looks in repo_root (parent of cards_root) rather than cards_root itself
recommendations.rationale: Non-obvious that Makefile is one level up from card directory structure

recommendations.recommendation: Consider whether policy.toml check in doctor.rs should also respect --fast flag if it's expensive to validate
recommendations.rationale: Currently make check is the only gated check; if other expensive checks exist, consistent gating pattern would be cleaner

recommendations.recommendation: Document --fast flag in help/changelog as new feature, noting that full doctor now includes make check verification
recommendations.rationale: Users upgrading to this version will see slower doctor invocation by default
